results.title: Sturgeon once extinct in the wild returns to China’s Yangtze River
results.description: It is the first time natural reproduction of the Yangtze sturgeon is documented in a wild setting.

results.title: Letter: Supporting a better grid
results.description: A better electrical grid would solve lots of problems: blackouts, high prices, power-starved data centers, wildfire ignition and even some national security issues. But the difficulty of getting permits stands in the way of a better grid.

results.title: Susan Mulala: A Story of Faith, Resilience, and Service
results.description: Susan Mulala: A Story of Faith, Resilience, and Service In the heart of Mwense Central stands a young woman whose journey into public service was not born out of privilege or ambition alone, but from witnessing everyday struggles that too many families know all too well. Overcrowded classrooms, under-equipped clinics, poor infrastructure, and limited opportunities [...] The post Susan Mulala: A Story of Faith, Resilience, and Service first appeared on The Zambian Observer .
results.source: The Zambian Observer - The Zambian Observer - Late

results.title: Muhammad Ikmal Opat steps down from Widad
results.description: PETALING JAYA: Tan Sri Muhammad Ikmal Opat Abdullah, the single-largest shareholder of Widad Group Bhd, has resigned as the group's executive deputy chairman.
